flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alcorn State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Alcorn State University rose 50% between 2021 and 2024 (32.8% → 49.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Alcorn State University rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 (41.9% → 57.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Alcorn State University fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($31.0k → $27.0k).
